testcase.name: @BeforeClass setUp
testcase.failure:
org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command ''C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe' -P 5037 -s 100.119.228.107\:45163 install -g 'C:\Users\Administrator\.appium\node_modules\appium-uiautomator2-driver\node_modules\io.appium.settings\apks\settings_apk-debug.apk'' exited with code 1'; Command output: adb.exe: device offline
Host info: host: 'VIAUTOMATE', ip: '100.102.180.112' Build info: version: '4.13.0', revision: 'ba948ece5b*' System info: os.name: 'Windows Server 2022', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', appium:skipServerInstallation=true, appium:newCommandTimeout=300, appium:nativeWebScreenshot=true, appium:enforceAppInstall=false, appium:automationName=UiAutomator2, appium:fullReset=false,
